# UC-22.2.58 · NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) — Cisco ISE ANC Closed-Loop Effectiveness Evidence

> **Criticality:** Critical &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance

*We continuously evidence NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) — that automated containment is effective. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.*

---

## Description

We continuously evidence NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) — that automated containment is effective.

## Value

NIS2 audit will probe incident response effectiveness. This UC produces measurable, machine-attested evidence of containment efficacy — not just policy.

## Implementation

Daily.

## Evidence

Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) tagging.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Quarantine fires; attack stops within 2 min. Healthy KPI evidence.

### Negative scenario

Quarantine ineffective. Evidence captured for remediation.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.80 operational.
- ES Notable framework integrated.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.2.58: NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) — Containment Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.2.58,reg=NIS2,clause=Art.21(2)(b)
```

Quarterly review with NIS2 ARCSI/regulator.

## SPL

```spl
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode=86001 anc_action=quarantine earliest=-1d
| eval anc_time=_time, endpoint_mac=mac
| join endpoint_mac [search index=notable severity=high earliest=-1d | rename _time as last_attack_time]
| eval quarantine_to_stop=anc_time - last_attack_time
| stats avg(quarantine_to_stop) as avg_seconds, count by anc_policy
| eval nis2_clause="Art.21(2)(b)", control="Containment_Effectiveness"
| collect index=audit_evidence
```

## Visualization

NIS2 containment-effectiveness panel.

## Known False Positives

1. Endpoint moved to non-NAC port post-quarantine.
